claims.claim: Witness, Mirror, and Dialogue are distinct autonomous modes, and Witness should remain a seeing/being-seen surface rather than only a diagnostic.
Continuity trajectory and afterimage evidence are needed so high-entropy subjective texture does not vanish when the live vector stays bounded.
Reply-linked contact should require peer acknowledgement or trace evidence, and legacy bidirectional observation should not be mistaken for a complete subjective handshake.

Forcing REPLY_ASTRID, changing subjective-shift priority, or raising porosity/permeability allowance above entropy 0.85 would alter live autonomous/control behavior and requires Mike/operator approval with a V2 authority lifecycle packet.
